MemberSignature.Value: public string Source { get; }
.property instance string Source
Public ReadOnly Property Source As String
member this.Source : string

Docs.summary: Encoded source that identifies the position of the field value in the content.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.ContentSource[]? Sources { get; }
.property instance class Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.ContentSource[] Sources
Public ReadOnly Property Sources As ContentSource()
member this.Sources : Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.ContentSource[]

Docs.summary: Gets the parsed sources that identify the position of the field value in the content. Returns null if no source information is available.

remarks.para: The source is encoded as a string (e.g., "D(1,0.5712,...)") in the service response. This property parses it into strongly-typed instances: for document regions or for audio/video regions.
Multiple regions separated by ; are returned as separate array elements.

Docs.exception: The source string has an unrecognized prefix or is malformed.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Collections.Generic.IList<Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.ContentSpan> Spans { get; }

Public ReadOnly Property Spans As IList(Of ContentSpan)
member this.Spans : System.Collections.Generic.IList<Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.ContentSpan>

Docs.summary: Span(s) associated with the field value in the markdown content.
